productDisplayName: Vans Men Rowley Style 99 S Red Casual Shoes
description: Bright and bold Rowley Style 99's in unmistakable red with changeable white or red laces. Chunky and loud, these shoes are not for tiptoeing around quietly. Wear with baggy jeans and a bright printed tee to achieve the ultimate skater style. Designed with skating in mind, vans shoes are built to perform. Reinforced stitch lines, the strongest materials, extra cushioning, rivets and engineered soles make this a durable choice. Upper Leather suede uppers for durability and comfort Padded collar and tongue for extra comfort Lace-ups for a snug Fit Brand name appliqued on the tongue and brand name on the back, on the lasting Cushioned footbed for all day comfort Midsole EVA midsole for better shock absorption Outsole Rubber outsole for durability Reverse waffle pattern for better grip Lasting with toe counter for extra protection to the toes shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
